pages.text: This is a Golden Eagle. Golden Eagles are known as excellent and deadly dangerous hunters.

pages.title: About the Golden Eagle
pages.text: Golden Eagles can be found sometimes on ground or in the skies. $(br2)These animals can and will attack cats and kits most of the time. $(br2)The few times a Golden Eagle is not agressive... Means that eagle can be befriended! Only if you show your trust first. I wonder if it would be possible for cats to fly eagles...?$(br)
